description: For each round, Claude read the messages of the current round with all preceding rounds available as context, and selected the 8 most important messages from the current round. Selection is by narrative/decision importance rather than a statistical score.

selection_settings.criterion: plot-advancing decisions, admissions, risks, strategy shifts, and pivotal external events; routine/filler and near-duplicate messages deprioritized
selection_settings.scoring: human-style judgment; rank 1 = most important within the round
